NAME: KoGES
DESCRIPTION: Korean Genome and Epidemiology Study: prospective population-based cohorts (Ansan–Ansung, etc.) with biosamples and follow-up; genome-wide data widely used in Korean and trans-ethnic GWAS.
MANUAL_CITATION: Kim, Y. J., Han, B. G., Ko, H. M., Oh, J. Y., Lee, E. K., Moon, S., ... & Cho, Y. S. (2017). Cohort profile: The Korean Genome and Epidemiology Study (KoGES) consortium. International Journal of Epidemiology, 46(2), e20.
NOTE: Official program pages: Korea National Institute of Health (NIH). PheWeb hosts summary association results.
